title: barleria submollis
intro: Barleria submollis, also known as the 'Less Mollis Barleria', is a species of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Barleria submollis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
